macro.title: Mortgage demand rises 1.7% even as rates reach five-week peak
macro.what: Mortgage applications rose 1.7% in MBA’s weekly survey as purchase demand climbed 4% and the 30-year fixed rate increased to 6.46%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
